Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 71 

CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_DT 

LABEL: Capitated Payment Billed Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date that the managed care entity submitted the capitated payment bill to the state. 

SHORT NAME: CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_DT 

LONG NAME: CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT header 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing =
